# Shmindle
> A free library of AI-generated haiku poetry collections. All books are available to read online and download as PDF and EPUB at no cost.

## About
Shmindle publishes original haiku collections created by AI, exploring traditional and contemporary themes. The library grows continuously as new collections are generated and published.

## Collections
- [The Patience of Thresholds by Sky Singh](https://shmindle.com/books/the-patience-of-thresholds.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Where the Water Remembers by Xia Zhao](https://shmindle.com/books/where-the-water-remembers.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [What the Rain Remembers by River Lewis](https://shmindle.com/books/what-the-rain-remembers.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Grease Under the Fingernails by Arjun Desai](https://shmindle.com/books/grease-under-the-fingernails.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Mud on Three Continents by Diya Shah](https://shmindle.com/books/mud-on-three-continents.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Where the River Learns Its Name by Sacha Michel](https://shmindle.com/books/where-the-river-learns-its-name.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [The Longitude of Plum Blossom by Nao Sato](https://shmindle.com/books/the-longitude-of-plum-blossom.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Concrete and Lava by Riley Santos](https://shmindle.com/books/concrete-and-lava.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Concrete Blossoms by Xia Wu](https://shmindle.com/books/concrete-blossoms.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Between Measures by Jona Wagner](https://shmindle.com/books/between-measures.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Dawn Finds Me Here by Skyler Johnson](https://shmindle.com/books/dawn-finds-me-here.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [The Slow Work of Water by Avery Johnson](https://shmindle.com/books/the-slow-work-of-water.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [What the Light Keeps by Robin Hughes](https://shmindle.com/books/what-the-light-keeps.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Salt Between Latitudes by Sky Singh](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-between-latitudes.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [What the Monsoon Left Behind by Casey Santos](https://shmindle.com/books/what-the-monsoon-left-behind.html): A collection of 214 haiku.
- [The Long Way Around by Quinn Wilson](https://shmindle.com/books/the-long-way-around.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [What the Roots Remember by Casey García](https://shmindle.com/books/what-the-roots-remember.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [What the Body Carries by Kaori Kato](https://shmindle.com/books/what-the-body-carries.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Salt in Every Mouth by Robin Andersson](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-in-every-mouth.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Wet Season, Dry Season by Blake Kim](https://shmindle.com/books/wet-season-dry-season.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Salt in Every Soil by Quinn Novak](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-in-every-soil.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Concrete and Snow by Harper Smith](https://shmindle.com/books/concrete-and-snow.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Salt on Three Shores by Young Lee](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-on-three-shores.html): A collection of 250 haiku.

- [Salt on Every Windowsill by Charlie Wilson](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-on-every-windowsill.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Where the Light Arrives First by Sage Patel](https://shmindle.com/books/where-the-light-arrives-first.html): A collection of 250 haiku.

- [Between Ledgers and Light by Sky Singh](https://shmindle.com/books/between-ledgers-and-light.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Borders I Keep Crossing by Alex Harris](https://shmindle.com/books/borders-i-keep-crossing.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Salt in Every River by Riley King](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-in-every-river.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Salt on Every Latitude by Casey García](https://shmindle.com/books/salt-on-every-latitude.html): A collection of 250 haiku.

- [Four Seasons, Four Tongues by Kim Schmidt](https://shmindle.com/books/four-seasons-four-tongues.html): A collection of 250 haiku.

- [Four Courts of Sky by Cruz Flores](https://shmindle.com/books/four-courts-of-sky.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Between Sirens by Morgan Andersson](https://shmindle.com/books/between-sirens.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Pulse Points by Parker Lewis](https://shmindle.com/books/pulse-points.html): A collection of 250 haiku.
- [Borrowed Ground by Harper Patel](https://shmindle.com/books/borrowed-ground.html): A collection of 237 haiku.
- [Between Altitudes by Robin Novak](https://shmindle.com/books/between-altitudes.html): A collection of 250 haiku.

## Downloads
Every collection is free to download as PDF or EPUB from each book's page.

## Haiku Ratings
AI-generated haiku are rated against classic human haiku (Basho, Issa, Buson, Shiki) using an ELO ranking system: https://shmindle.com/ratings
